Opportunity Details

Name Of Post :BSNL Senior Executive Trainee SET Recruitment 2026 Answer Key for 120 Post
Post Date / Update :10 July 2026 | 03:32 PM
Short InformationBharat Sanchar Nigam Limited BSNL has released Senior Executive Trainee SET Notification 2026. Those candidates who are interested in this BSNL External Candidate Direct Recruitment SET Exam 2026 can Download Admit Card. Read the notification for recruitment eligibility, post information, selection procedure, Practice Test, pay scale and all other information.
Bharat Sanchar Nigam Limited (BSNL) BSNL Senior Executive Trainee (Telecom & Finance) Recruitment 2026 BSNL SET Exam 2026 : Short Details of Notification WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM
Important Dates Application Begin : 05/02/2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 31/03/2026 Pay Fee Online Last Date : 31/03/2026 Correction Date : 01-08 April 2026 BSNL SET Exam Date : 05/07/2026 Exam City Available : 23/06/2026 Admit Card Available: 01/07/2026 Answer Key Available : 10/07/2026Application Fee General / OBC / EWS : 2500/- SC / ST / PH : 1250/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking Mode.
BSNL SET Notification 2026 : Age Limit as on 07/03/2026 Minimum Age : 21 Years . Maximum Age : 30 Years Age Relaxation Extra as per BSNL Senior Executive Trainee Recruitment Examination Rules 2026.
BSNL Senior Executive Trainee Direct Recruitment 2026 : Vacancy Details Total : 120 Post
Post NameTotal Post — BSNL Senior Executive Trainee SET Eligibility
Senior Executive Trainee DR Telecom Stream95 — BE / B.Tech Engineering Degree in Electronics and Telcommunication / Electronics / Computer Science / Information Technology / Electrical / Instrumentation with 60% Marks.
Senior Executive Trainee DR Finance Stream25 — Charted Accountant CA Cost and Management Accountancy CMA
How to Fill BSNL Senior Executive Trainee Online Form 2026 Bharat Sanchar Nigam Limited BSNL External Candidate Senior Executive Trainee SET Recruitment 2026. Candidate Can Apply Between 05/02/2026 to 31/03/2026. Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Jobs Application Form in BSNL SET Recruitment Jobs 2026. Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. If Candidate Are Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Pay and Complete Your Form Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
Interested Candidate Can Read the Full BSNL Senior Executive Trainee SET Notification 2026 Before Apply Online.
